home.trustedBy: Trusted by Filipinos across the country
home.heroSubtitle: Post a job, receive quotes from verified providers, and pay with full escrow protection. Plumbing, electrical, cleaning, and more.
home.browseByServiceSub: Whatever you need done, we’ve got a pro for it.
home.topRatedSub: Ready to take on your next job.
home.latestJobsSub: Real jobs posted by clients — apply now before they’re filled.
home.howItWorksSub: Three simple steps to get the job done.
home.step1Desc: Describe what you need, set your budget, and pick a schedule. Takes under 2 minutes.
home.step2Desc: Receive competitive quotes from verified local providers — usually within hours.
home.step3Desc: Funds are held securely in escrow and only released after you approve the work.
home.whySubtitle: Built for the Filipino market, with the protections you deserve.
home.feature1Desc: Your payment is only released when you’re 100% satisfied with the work.
home.feature2Desc: Every provider goes through identity and background verification (KYC).
home.feature3Desc: We focus on Filipino neighborhoods and local service providers — no overseas middlemen.
home.feature4Desc: Transparent reviews from real clients keep quality high and providers accountable.
home.growBusinessSub: The more jobs you complete, the more perks you unlock — lower fees, higher visibility, and exclusive opportunities.
home.startAsProvider: Start as a provider — it’s free
home.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of clients and providers on LocalPro. It’s completely free to sign up and post your first job.

clientPages.jobsSub: Manage and track your posted jobs. Click any job to view quotes and take action.

clientPages.banner_cancelledBody: This job has been cancelled. If escrow was funded, a refund will be processed to your wallet.

clientPages.postJob_detailsTip: A detailed description gets you 3× more quotes. Use AI to generate one from your title, then refine it.

clientPages.postJob_aiMatchFooter: Providers will see your job after it's approved and can send you a quote.

clientPages.upgrade_body: Hi {name}! Unlock the full power of LocalPro for your business. No credit card. No commitment. Forever free.
clientPages.upgrade_badge: Always free — no hidden charges ever
clientPages.upgrade_benefit1Desc: Post as many jobs as your business needs — no caps, no queues.

clientPages.upgrade_benefit3Desc: Stand out with a verified Business badge that builds trust with providers.

pesoPages.clientRewards_redeemDesc: Convert your points into cashback credits. 100 pts = ₱10. Minimum: 500 pts.

pesoPages.clientSupport_subheading: Chat with our team for help with jobs, payments, or disputes.
pesoPages.clientSupport_upgradeDesc: Priority Support — including a dedicated account manager, 4-hour response SLA, and white-glove onboarding — is available on the Enterprise plan. Your current plan is {plan}.
pesoPages.clientSupport_tourStep1Desc: Send a message below and our support team will get back to you as soon as possible.
pesoPages.clientSupport_tourStep2Desc: We typically respond within a few hours during business hours (Mon–Sat, 8am–6pm).
pesoPages.clientSupport_tourStep3Desc: Having trouble with a job or payment? Describe the problem clearly and include relevant job IDs.
pesoPages.clientSupport_tourStep4Desc: For payment disputes, our team can escalate and involve both parties to reach a fair resolution.
pesoPages.clientSupport_tipPost: and a brief description of the issue in your first message.
pesoPages.clientSupport_chatEmptyMsg: Send us a message and our support team will get back to you shortly.

pesoPages.clientUpgrade_benefit4Desc: Your jobs are surfaced first to top-rated providers in the marketplace.
pesoPages.clientUpgrade_benefit5Desc: Skip the queue — business accounts get faster response times from our team.
pesoPages.clientUpgrade_benefit6Desc: Access analytics, spend summaries, and recurring job management in one place.

adminForceWithdraw.warningBodyNamedSuffix: will be removed from this job.

kycUpload.headerSub: Upload documents to build client trust and unlock more features
kycUpload.bannerApproved: ✅ Your identity has been verified. The verified badge is now visible on your profile.
kycUpload.bannerPending: ⏳ Your documents are under review. This typically takes 1–2 business days. You can still upload additional documents below to strengthen your application.
kycUpload.bannerRejectedHint: Re-upload the correct documents below and submit each one.
kycUpload.badgesLabel: Upload documents to earn badges and build client trust
kycUpload.fileReady: File ready — click Submit to save
kycUpload.footerNote: Accepted formats: JPG, PNG, PDF · Max 10 MB per file · Each document is submitted individually
kycUpload.docTypeSelfieHint: Hold your government ID next to your face
kycUpload.docTypeTrainingHint: Any professional training or skills cert
kycUpload.docTypeBusinessHint: DTI Registration or Local Business Permit
kycUpload.docTypeBankHint: Bank statement, GCash, or Maya account screenshot
kycUpload.docNoteGovernmentId: Unlocks identity verification alongside Selfie with ID
kycUpload.docNoteSelfie: Both ID + selfie required to earn the Legit badge
kycUpload.docNoteTesda: Proves your trade skills to potential clients
kycUpload.docNoteTraining: Highlights advanced training beyond standard qualifications
kycUpload.docNoteBusiness: Shows clients you run a legitimate registered business
kycUpload.docNoteBank: Enables faster payouts and builds payout trust
kycUpload.docNoteBackground: Strongest trust signal — clients prefer background-checked providers

notifications.jobApprovedStatusLive: live and accepting quotes from providers
notifications.jobDirectInviteMessage: A client has posted "{jobTitle}" directly to you. Check your active jobs.
notifications.businessJobInviteMessage: {orgName} posted a new job: "{jobTitle}". You're a preferred provider — be the first to quote!
notifications.jobRejectedMessage: "{jobTitle}" was not approved. Please review our guidelines and resubmit.
notifications.newProviderApplicationMessage: {userName} has registered as a provider and is awaiting approval.
notifications.consultationAcceptedMessage: Your consultation "{title}" has been accepted. You can now convert it to a job.
notifications.consultationExpiredMessage: Your consultation request "{title}" has expired after 7 days
notifications.consultationStaleMessage: Your accepted consultation "{title}" has been open for over 7 days. Convert it to a job or close it.
notifications.jobExpiredMessage: Your job "{jobTitle}" expired after {threshold} days with no accepted quote. You can repost it anytime.
notifications.jobReopenedMessage: Your job "{jobTitle}" was reopened because escrow was not funded within {threshold} hours. Providers can quote again.
notifications.jobAssignmentCancelledMessage: The client did not fund escrow for "{jobTitle}" within {threshold} hours, so the job has been reopened.
notifications.autoPaymentReleasedMessage: ₱{amount} has been automatically released to your account for "{jobTitle}".
notifications.escrowAutoReleasedMessage: Payment for "{jobTitle}" was automatically released to the provider after {threshold} days.
notifications.quoteExpiredMessage: Your quote was automatically closed after {days} days with no response from the client.
notifications.reminderFundEscrowMessage: Your job "{jobTitle}" has an accepted provider waiting. Please fund escrow to get started.
notifications.reminderNoQuotesTitle: No quotes yet on your job
notifications.reminderNoQuotesMessage: Your job "{jobTitle}" has been open for 3+ days with no quotes. Consider adjusting the budget or description.
notifications.reminderStartJobMessage: The client has funded escrow for "{jobTitle}". Please begin work and mark the job as started.
notifications.reminderCompleteJobTitle: Reminder: mark your job as complete
notifications.reminderCompleteJobMessage: "{jobTitle}" has been in progress for over 7 days. Please mark it as complete once finished.
notifications.reminderLeaveReviewTitle: How did it go? Leave a review
notifications.reminderLeaveReviewMessage: Your job "{jobTitle}" is complete. Take a moment to rate your provider — it helps the community.
notifications.disputeOpenedMessage: A dispute was raised on one of your jobs. An admin will review it.
notifications.disputeResolvedRelease: The dispute was resolved. Payment has been released to the provider.
notifications.disputeResolvedRefund: The dispute was resolved. A refund has been issued.
notifications.disputeResolvedFee: A case handling fee of ₱{feeAmount} was deducted from your wallet.
notifications.jobMarkedCompleteMessage: The provider has marked the job as done. Please review and release payment.
notifications.escrowReleasedMessage: The client approved the job. Your payment has been released.
notifications.providerWithdrewMessage: Your provider could not proceed with the job. It has been re-opened and is now accepting new providers.
notifications.boostActivatedWalletMessage: Your {listingType} boost is now active for 7 days. ₱{price} was deducted from your wallet.

notifications.lowBidCreditsSingularMessage: You have {count} bid credit remaining. Top up to keep submitting quotes.
notifications.lowBidCreditsPluralMessage: You have {count} bid credits remaining. Top up to keep submitting quotes.
